rule: Repo scripts should stay shared/reproducible; host-specific ops belong outside tracked scripts/
expected_pattern: No personal host identifiers or machine-local runtime probes in shared scripts

rule: Mandatory validation gates must remain documented and runnable
expected_pattern: flake metadata + eval stateVersion + build home.path + build system.toplevel

rule: Public safety gate must detect sensitive/path leakage
expected_pattern: No unallowlisted local paths/private IP/personal email/tokens

rule: Mutable copy-once files can intentionally diverge
expected_pattern: Parity checks must distinguish mutable drift from hard failures

rule: Shared validation scripts should avoid single-host hardcoding unless explicitly host-scoped
expected_pattern: Avoid fixed host/profile identifiers unless explicitly scoped to a host workflow

rule: Emacs checks excluded for this audit
